title: cacalia interjecta
intro: Cacalia interjecta, also known as Wild Borage or Edible Burdock, is a perennial plant species native to Eastern Asia. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cacalia interjecta include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cacalia interjecta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also consumed as a leafy green vegetable in some Asian cuisines.
